Operation 'getNewVisits' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of when to use this operation, what parameters are needed, and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of companies that have visited the specified domain for the first time.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve first-time visitor companies for a domain
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of companies that have visited the specified domain for the first time. Requires domain identifier and optional filtering parameters to narrow results. Returns a paginated list of new visitor sessions with company information. This operation queries historical visitor data without modifying any records.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't specify what 'new visits' means. Description lacks clarity on required parameters (domain specification), expected inputs (filtering options), response format (pagination, data structure), and confirms no side effects. Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of when to use this operation, what parameters are needed, and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'getVisitorSessions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity on what constitutes 'detailed' data and doesn't explain the relationship between company and session data. Added context about required parameters, return structure, and use case to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed company information and associated visitor session data for a specified domain within a given time range.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve visitor sessions and company data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed visitor session data along with associated company information for a specified domain within a given time range. Requires domain and time range parameters. Returns session records with company details. Use this to analyze visitor behavior and company engagement patterns.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity on what constitutes 'detailed' data and doesn't explain the relationship between company and session data. Added context about required parameters, return structure, and use case to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getCompanyInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about what company information is returned and what parameters are required. Enhanced with parameter requirements and example return data types to aid AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed company information for a specified domain within a given time range.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed company information associated with a specified domain within a given time range. Requires domain and time range parameters. Returns company profile data including identification, classification, and engagement metrics. Use this to obtain company details for visitor analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about what company information is returned and what parameters are required. Enhanced with parameter requirements and example return data types to aid AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getSessionInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about session data contents and doesn't clarify parameter requirements. Added details about what session information includes and the operation's analytical purpose for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed session information for a specified domain within a given time range.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed session information for visitors to a specified domain within a given time range. Requires domain and time range parameters. Returns session records including visitor activity, duration, and engagement data. Use this to analyze individual visitor session behavior.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about session data contents and doesn't clarify parameter requirements. Added details about what session information includes and the operation's analytical purpose for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed user data for sessions associated with a specified domain within a given time range.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve user data from visitor sessions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed user data associated with visitor sessions for a specified domain within a given time range. Requires domain and time range parameters. Returns user profile information linked to session records. Use this to correlate user characteristics with session activity.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks clarity on the relationship between user data and sessions. Description is vague about what user data is included and doesn't specify parameter requirements. Enhanced to clarify the session-user relationship and improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getIntensiveVisits' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is vague about what 'intensive' means. data.current_description: Retrieves a list of companies that have had intensive visits to the specified domain.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of companies that have had intensive visits (high-frequency or high-engagement sessions) to the specified domain. Requires domain parameter and optional filtering parameters. Returns company records ranked by visit intensity. Use this to identify highly engaged company visitors.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about what 'intensive' means. Description lacks clarity on intensity criteria and doesn't explain parameter requirements or output structure. Added definition of intensive visits and clarified the operation's purpose for identifying key company prospects.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of companies that have visited the specified domain multiple times.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of companies that have visited the specified domain multiple times (returning visitors). Requires domain parameter and optional filtering parameters. data.reasoning: Summary could be more specific about 'returning' context. Description lacks parameter details and doesn't explain what data is returned about repeat visits.
